name: Sag-Aftra
description_short: SAG-AFTRA Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union serving entertainment industry professionals with savings accounts, loans, credit cards, and mobile banking.
description_long:
SAG-AFTRA Federal Credit Union is a credit union established to serve members of the Screen Actors Guild-American Federation of Television and Radio Artists (SAG-AFTRA). As a federal credit union, it is NCUA-insured and operates as a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution rather than a traditional bank. The organization maintains a physical branch location with hours from 9:30am to 5:00pm Monday through Friday.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including savings accounts (referred to as "shares"), auto loans with pre-approval options, personal loans at advertised low rates, and credit cards with no hidden fees. Members can access their accounts through home banking platforms, mobile apps (available on Apple App Store and Google Play), and telephone banking. All debit and credit cards are compatible with mobile wallets including Apple Pay, Google Wallet, and Samsung Wallet for contactless payments. The institution also provides financial assistance programs for members experiencing difficult times.

SAG-AFTRA FCU distinguishes itself through its specialized focus on serving entertainment industry professionals, which creates a membership community tailored to that sector's financial needs and circumstances. The credit union emphasizes security with features like biometric authentication for mobile wallet transactions and fraud prevention tools. They also provide transparent account management with no hidden fees on credit cards and member-owned governance structure.

As a credit union, SAG-AFTRA FCU is best suited for eligible entertainment professionals who value member-ownership benefits, competitive rates, and personalized service. The main consideration is membership eligibility—individuals must meet SAG-AFTRA affiliation requirements to join. The institution provides legitimate financial services with standard credit union protections, though the website lacks detailed rate comparisons or extensive product specifications that might help consumers evaluate competitive positioning.
services: Savings accounts (share accounts) with membership ownership stake
Credit cards with low rates and no hidden fees
Auto loans with pre-approval and all-in-one application
Personal loans at advertised low rates
Home banking (bill pay, transfers, statements, account alerts)
Mobile banking app (check deposit, transfers, card controls, fraud prevention)
Mobile wallet integration (Apple Pay, Google Wallet, Samsung Wallet)
Financial assistance programs for members in hardship
Account security resources and scam alerts
pros: NCUA-insured member-owned credit union with federal backing and no profit motive
Credit cards explicitly advertised as having low rates and no hidden fees
Mobile wallet compatibility with Apple Pay, Google Wallet, and Samsung Wallet for all debit and credit cards
Biometric authentication for mobile wallet transactions enhancing security
Multiple banking channels: home banking, mobile app, telephone banking (toll-free 800-392-9321)
Pre-approval auto loan process and all-in-one loan application system
Financial assistance program specifically for members facing difficult times
Low loan rates emphasized as competitive advantage across product line
cons: Membership restricted to SAG-AFTRA members, limiting accessibility to entertainment industry professionals only
Limited branch access with single location and restricted hours (9:30am-5:00pm weekdays only)
No specific APR, fee, or rate information disclosed on public website for comparison shopping
No mention of overdraft protection, ATM networks, or extended banking services beyond core products
Minimal transparency on loan approval criteria or credit score requirements
best_for: SAG-AFTRA union members seeking member-owned credit union services with personalized support
Entertainment professionals needing specialized financial products from a lender familiar with industry income patterns
Consumers prioritizing no-fee credit cards and transparency in financial products over maximum branch access
Members wanting mobile-first banking with modern security features like biometric authentication
diagnosis: SAG-AFTRA FCU is ideal for SAG-AFTRA union members seeking a member-owned credit union with modern digital banking, no-fee credit cards, and personalized support tailored to entertainment industry professionals. The primary limitation is membership eligibility—eligibility depends on SAG-AFTRA affiliation, and the single physical branch location restricts in-person service access for most members.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Sag-Aftra — Credit Union in Burbank, CA | CreditDoc
meta_description: Sag-Aftra — NCUA-insured credit union in Burbank, CA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
